name: pharma-manufacturing-demo
description: Deterministic multi-domain pharma manufacturing scenario covering ISA-88 recipe hierarchy, ISA-95 physical model, compliance/eBR review records, entities, versioned foreign keys, and temporal inspection.

steps.name: recipe schema
statements: CREATE TABLE recipe.master_recipes (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, recipe_code TEXT UNIQUE, title TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL, target_batch_size_kg INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0)

CREATE TABLE recipe.recipe_unit_procedures (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, recipe_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES master_recipes(id), unit_procedure_code TEXT NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL, sequence_no INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0)

CREATE TABLE recipe.recipe_operations (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, recipe_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES master_recipes(id), unit_procedure_code TEXT NOT NULL, operation_code TEXT NOT NULL, instruction_text TEXT NOT NULL, sequence_no INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0)

CREATE TABLE recipe.recipe_phases (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, recipe_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES master_recipes(id), unit_procedure_code TEXT NOT NULL, operation_code TEXT NOT NULL, phase_code TEXT NOT NULL, instruction_text TEXT NOT NULL, sequence_no INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0)

CREATE TABLE recipe.recipe_parameters (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, recipe_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES master_recipes(id), applies_to_phase_code TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', parameter_name TEXT NOT NULL, target_value TEXT NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE recipe.phase_blocks (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, phase_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES recipe_phases(id), block_code TEXT NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL, sequence_no INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, layout JSON NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}')

CREATE TABLE recipe.block_components (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, block_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES phase_blocks(id), component_code TEXT NOT NULL, component_type TEXT NOT NULL, definition JSON NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', sequence_no INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, layout JSON NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}')
CREATE ENTITY master_recipe_entity (ROOT master_recipes, INCLUDES recipe_unit_procedures, recipe_operations, recipe_phases, recipe_parameters, phase_blocks, block_components)

steps.name: operations schema
statements: CREATE TABLE operations.sites (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, site_code TEXT UNIQUE, title TEXT NOT NULL, gxp_status TEXT NOT NULL)
CREATE TABLE operations.areas (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, site_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES sites(id), area_code TEXT NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL, isa95_level TEXT NOT NULL)
CREATE TABLE operations.process_cells (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, area_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES areas(id), cell_code TEXT NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL)
CREATE TABLE operations.units (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, process_cell_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES process_cells(id), unit_code TEXT NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL, unit_class TEXT NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE operations.equipment_assets (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, unit_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES units(id), equipment_code TEXT NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL, asset_role TEXT NOT NULL, calibration_state TEXT NOT NULL)
CREATE ENTITY manufacturing_model_entity (ROOT sites, INCLUDES areas, process_cells)

steps.name: inventory schema
statements: CREATE TABLE inventory.material_lots (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, material_code TEXT NOT NULL, supplier_lot_code TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL, quantity_grams INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, expiry_day TEXT NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE inventory.lot_reservations (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, lot_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES material_lots(id), reserved_for_kind TEXT NOT NULL, reserved_for_id TEXT NOT NULL, reserved_grams INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, status TEXT NOT NULL)
CREATE ENTITY material_lot_entity (ROOT material_lots, INCLUDES lot_reservations)

steps.name: execution schema
statements: CREATE TABLE execution.batch_orders (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, batch_number TEXT UNIQUE, recipe_id TEXT NOT NULL, recipe_version INT, unit_id TEXT NOT NULL, unit_lsn INT, planned_quantity_kg INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, status TEXT NOT NULL, ebr_status TEXT NOT NULL, opened_by TEXT NOT NULL, VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (recipe_id) REFERENCES recipe.master_recipes(id) AS OF recipe_version, VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (unit_id) REFERENCES operations.units(id) AS OF unit_lsn)

CREATE TABLE execution.batch_steps (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, batch_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES batch_orders(id), unit_procedure_code TEXT NOT NULL, operation_code TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL, recorded_by TEXT NOT NULL, note TEXT NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE execution.batch_phase_records (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, batch_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES batch_orders(id), unit_procedure_code TEXT NOT NULL, operation_code TEXT NOT NULL, phase_code TEXT NOT NULL, phase_state TEXT NOT NULL, equipment_id TEXT NOT NULL, equipment_lsn INT, recorded_by TEXT NOT NULL, note TEXT NOT NULL, VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (equipment_id) REFERENCES operations.equipment_assets(id) AS OF equipment_lsn)

CREATE TABLE execution.batch_material_links (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, batch_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES batch_orders(id), lot_id TEXT NOT NULL, lot_version INT, material_role TEXT NOT NULL, consumed_grams INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (lot_id) REFERENCES inventory.material_lots(id) AS OF lot_version)

CREATE TABLE execution.block_records (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, batch_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES batch_orders(id), phase_record_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES batch_phase_records(id), block_code TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL, recorded_by TEXT NOT NULL, note TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '')

CREATE TABLE execution.component_records (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, block_record_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES block_records(id), component_code TEXT NOT NULL, value TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', recorded_by TEXT NOT NULL, recorded_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT TX_TIMESTAMP)
CREATE ENTITY batch_record_entity (ROOT batch_orders, INCLUDES batch_steps, batch_phase_records, batch_material_links, block_records, component_records)

steps.name: quality schema
statements: CREATE TABLE quality.deviations (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, batch_id TEXT NOT NULL, batch_version INT, phase_record_id TEXT NOT NULL, lot_id TEXT NOT NULL, lot_version INT, equipment_id TEXT NOT NULL, equipment_lsn INT, status TEXT NOT NULL, severity TEXT NOT NULL, summary TEXT NOT NULL, VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (batch_id) REFERENCES execution.batch_orders(id) AS OF batch_version, VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (lot_id) REFERENCES inventory.material_lots(id) AS OF lot_version, VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (equipment_id) REFERENCES operations.equipment_assets(id) AS OF equipment_lsn)
CREATE TABLE quality.quality_reviews (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, deviation_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES deviations(id), review_stage TEXT NOT NULL, decision TEXT NOT NULL, rationale TEXT NOT NULL)

steps.name: quality entity schema
statements: CREATE ENTITY deviation_entity (ROOT deviations, INCLUDES quality_reviews)

steps.name: compliance schema
statements: CREATE TABLE compliance.batch_signatures (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, batch_id TEXT NOT NULL, batch_version INT, signature_scope TEXT NOT NULL, step_code TEXT NOT NULL, meaning TEXT NOT NULL, signer_id TEXT NOT NULL, signer_role TEXT NOT NULL, reason TEXT NOT NULL, VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (batch_id) REFERENCES execution.batch_orders(id) AS OF batch_version)

CREATE TABLE compliance.deviation_attestations (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, deviation_id TEXT NOT NULL, deviation_version INT, meaning TEXT NOT NULL, signer_id TEXT NOT NULL, signer_role TEXT NOT NULL, reason TEXT NOT NULL, VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (deviation_id) REFERENCES quality.deviations(id) AS OF deviation_version)

CREATE TABLE compliance.ebr_reviews (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, batch_id TEXT NOT NULL, batch_version INT, review_stage TEXT NOT NULL, decision TEXT NOT NULL, reviewer_id TEXT NOT NULL, reviewer_role TEXT NOT NULL, summary TEXT NOT NULL, VERSIONED FOREIGN KEY (batch_id) REFERENCES execution.batch_orders(id) AS OF batch_version)

steps.name: seed master recipe
statements: INSERT INTO recipe.master_recipes (id, recipe_code, title, status, target_batch_size_kg) VALUES ('recipe-001', 'MR-IBU-200', 'Ibuprofen Suspension 200 mg/5mL', 'EFFECTIVE', 100)
INSERT INTO recipe.recipe_unit_procedures (id, recipe_id, unit_procedure_code, title, sequence_no) VALUES ('recipe-up-001', 'recipe-001', 'UP-DISPENSE', 'Dispense and verify materials', 10)
INSERT INTO recipe.recipe_unit_procedures (id, recipe_id, unit_procedure_code, title, sequence_no) VALUES ('recipe-up-002', 'recipe-001', 'UP-BLEND-FILL', 'Blend and fill suspension', 20)

INSERT INTO recipe.recipe_operations (id, recipe_id, unit_procedure_code, operation_code, instruction_text, sequence_no) VALUES ('recipe-op-001', 'recipe-001', 'UP-DISPENSE', 'DISPENSE', 'Dispense verified materials to the pre-mix vessel', 10)

INSERT INTO recipe.recipe_operations (id, recipe_id, unit_procedure_code, operation_code, instruction_text, sequence_no) VALUES ('recipe-op-002', 'recipe-001', 'UP-BLEND-FILL', 'MIX', 'Mix suspension until torque and appearance are within target', 20)

INSERT INTO recipe.recipe_operations (id, recipe_id, unit_procedure_code, operation_code, instruction_text, sequence_no) VALUES ('recipe-op-003', 'recipe-001', 'UP-BLEND-FILL', 'FILL', 'Transfer bulk to filling line and reconcile yield', 30)

INSERT INTO recipe.recipe_phases (id, recipe_id, unit_procedure_code, operation_code, phase_code, instruction_text, sequence_no) VALUES ('recipe-phase-001', 'recipe-001', 'UP-DISPENSE', 'DISPENSE', 'DISPENSE_VERIFY', 'Verify released lots and line clearance before charging', 11)

INSERT INTO recipe.recipe_phases (id, recipe_id, unit_procedure_code, operation_code, phase_code, instruction_text, sequence_no) VALUES ('recipe-phase-002', 'recipe-001', 'UP-BLEND-FILL', 'MIX', 'MIX_BLEND', 'Blend suspension at validated speed until uniformity target is met', 21)

INSERT INTO recipe.recipe_phases (id, recipe_id, unit_procedure_code, operation_code, phase_code, instruction_text, sequence_no) VALUES ('recipe-phase-003', 'recipe-001', 'UP-BLEND-FILL', 'FILL', 'FILL_RUN', 'Fill approved bulk and reconcile yield by line order', 31)
INSERT INTO recipe.recipe_parameters (id, recipe_id, applies_to_phase_code, parameter_name, target_value) VALUES ('recipe-param-001', 'recipe-001', 'MIX_BLEND', 'mix_speed_rpm', '450')
INSERT INTO recipe.recipe_parameters (id, recipe_id, applies_to_phase_code, parameter_name, target_value) VALUES ('recipe-param-002', 'recipe-001', 'MIX_BLEND', 'hold_time_min', '35')

INSERT INTO recipe.phase_blocks (id, phase_id, block_code, title, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('block-001', 'recipe-phase-001', 'LINE_CLEARANCE', 'Line clearance verification', 10, '{"row":0,"col":0,"colSpan":12,"rowSpan":1}')

INSERT INTO recipe.block_components (id, block_id, component_code, component_type, definition, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('comp-001', 'block-001', 'line_clear_check', 'checkbox', '{"label":"Line clearance confirmed","required":true,"helpText":"Verify area is clean and previous product removed"}', 10, '{"row":0,"col":0,"colSpan":6}')

INSERT INTO recipe.block_components (id, block_id, component_code, component_type, definition, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('comp-002', 'block-001', 'area_photo', 'image', '{"label":"Area photo evidence","required":false,"helpText":"Capture photo of clean area"}', 20, '{"row":0,"col":6,"colSpan":6}')

INSERT INTO recipe.block_components (id, block_id, component_code, component_type, definition, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('comp-003', 'block-001', 'operator_signature', 'signature', '{"label":"Operator signature","required":true,"helpText":"Sign to confirm line clearance"}', 30, '{"row":1,"col":0,"colSpan":12}')

INSERT INTO recipe.phase_blocks (id, phase_id, block_code, title, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('block-002', 'recipe-phase-001', 'LOT_VERIFICATION', 'Lot verification and weighing', 20, '{"row":1,"col":0,"colSpan":12,"rowSpan":1}')

INSERT INTO recipe.block_components (id, block_id, component_code, component_type, definition, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('comp-004', 'block-002', 'api_lot_code', 'text_input', '{"label":"API lot code","required":true,"placeholder":"Scan or enter lot code"}', 10, '{"row":0,"col":0,"colSpan":6}')

INSERT INTO recipe.block_components (id, block_id, component_code, component_type, definition, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('comp-005', 'block-002', 'api_weight_grams', 'number_input', '{"label":"API weight (g)","required":true,"unit":"g","validation":{"min":1,"max":100000}}', 20, '{"row":0,"col":6,"colSpan":6}')

INSERT INTO recipe.block_components (id, block_id, component_code, component_type, definition, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('comp-006', 'block-002', 'vehicle_lot_code', 'text_input', '{"label":"Vehicle lot code","required":true,"placeholder":"Scan or enter lot code"}', 30, '{"row":1,"col":0,"colSpan":6}')

INSERT INTO recipe.block_components (id, block_id, component_code, component_type, definition, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('comp-007', 'block-002', 'vehicle_weight_grams', 'number_input', '{"label":"Vehicle weight (g)","required":true,"unit":"g","validation":{"min":1,"max":100000}}', 40, '{"row":1,"col":6,"colSpan":6}')

INSERT INTO recipe.block_components (id, block_id, component_code, component_type, definition, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('comp-008', 'block-002', 'weighing_verification', 'signature', '{"label":"Weighing verified by","required":true}', 50, '{"row":2,"col":0,"colSpan":12}')

INSERT INTO recipe.phase_blocks (id, phase_id, block_code, title, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('block-003', 'recipe-phase-002', 'MIXING_PARAMS', 'Mixing parameters', 10, '{"row":0,"col":0,"colSpan":12,"rowSpan":1}')

INSERT INTO recipe.block_components (id, block_id, component_code, component_type, definition, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('comp-009', 'block-003', 'mix_speed_rpm', 'number_input', '{"label":"Mixing speed (RPM)","required":true,"unit":"RPM","validation":{"min":100,"max":1000},"defaultValue":"450"}', 10, '{"row":0,"col":0,"colSpan":4}')

INSERT INTO recipe.block_components (id, block_id, component_code, component_type, definition, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('comp-010', 'block-003', 'mix_duration_min', 'number_input', '{"label":"Mix duration (min)","required":true,"unit":"min","validation":{"min":1,"max":120},"defaultValue":"35"}', 20, '{"row":0,"col":4,"colSpan":4}')

INSERT INTO recipe.block_components (id, block_id, component_code, component_type, definition, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('comp-011', 'block-003', 'torque_reading', 'number_input', '{"label":"Final torque reading (Nm)","required":true,"unit":"Nm","validation":{"min":0,"max":100}}', 30, '{"row":0,"col":8,"colSpan":4}')

INSERT INTO recipe.phase_blocks (id, phase_id, block_code, title, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('block-004', 'recipe-phase-002', 'UNIFORMITY_CHECK', 'Uniformity check', 20, '{"row":1,"col":0,"colSpan":12,"rowSpan":1}')

INSERT INTO recipe.block_components (id, block_id, component_code, component_type, definition, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('comp-012', 'block-004', 'uniformity_result', 'select', '{"label":"Uniformity test result","required":true,"options":[{"value":"PASS","label":"Pass"},{"value":"FAIL","label":"Fail"},{"value":"MARGINAL","label":"Marginal - needs review"}]}', 10, '{"row":0,"col":0,"colSpan":6}')

INSERT INTO recipe.block_components (id, block_id, component_code, component_type, definition, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('comp-013', 'block-004', 'uniformity_note', 'textarea', '{"label":"Observation notes","required":false,"placeholder":"Enter observations..."}', 20, '{"row":0,"col":6,"colSpan":6}')

INSERT INTO recipe.block_components (id, block_id, component_code, component_type, definition, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('comp-014', 'block-004', 'mix_sign_off', 'signature', '{"label":"Mixing sign-off","required":true}', 30, '{"row":1,"col":0,"colSpan":12}')

INSERT INTO recipe.phase_blocks (id, phase_id, block_code, title, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('block-005', 'recipe-phase-003', 'FILL_SETUP', 'Fill line setup', 10, '{"row":0,"col":0,"colSpan":12,"rowSpan":1}')

INSERT INTO recipe.block_components (id, block_id, component_code, component_type, definition, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('comp-015', 'block-005', 'fill_speed', 'select', '{"label":"Fill speed","required":true,"options":[{"value":"LOW","label":"Low (50 u/min)"},{"value":"MEDIUM","label":"Medium (100 u/min)"},{"value":"HIGH","label":"High (150 u/min)"}]}', 10, '{"row":0,"col":0,"colSpan":6}')

INSERT INTO recipe.block_components (id, block_id, component_code, component_type, definition, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('comp-016', 'block-005', 'target_fill_volume_ml', 'number_input', '{"label":"Target fill volume (mL)","required":true,"unit":"mL","validation":{"min":1,"max":1000}}', 20, '{"row":0,"col":6,"colSpan":6}')

INSERT INTO recipe.phase_blocks (id, phase_id, block_code, title, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('block-006', 'recipe-phase-003', 'YIELD_RECONCILIATION', 'Yield reconciliation', 20, '{"row":1,"col":0,"colSpan":12,"rowSpan":1}')

INSERT INTO recipe.block_components (id, block_id, component_code, component_type, definition, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('comp-017', 'block-006', 'units_produced', 'number_input', '{"label":"Units produced","required":true,"validation":{"min":0}}', 10, '{"row":0,"col":0,"colSpan":4}')

INSERT INTO recipe.block_components (id, block_id, component_code, component_type, definition, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('comp-018', 'block-006', 'units_rejected', 'number_input', '{"label":"Units rejected","required":true,"validation":{"min":0}}', 20, '{"row":0,"col":4,"colSpan":4}')

INSERT INTO recipe.block_components (id, block_id, component_code, component_type, definition, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('comp-019', 'block-006', 'yield_percent', 'calculated', '{"label":"Yield %","formula":"(units_produced - units_rejected) / units_produced * 100","unit":"%"}', 30, '{"row":0,"col":8,"colSpan":4}')

INSERT INTO recipe.block_components (id, block_id, component_code, component_type, definition, sequence_no, layout) VALUES ('comp-020', 'block-006', 'fill_sign_off', 'signature', '{"label":"Fill & reconciliation sign-off","required":true}', 40, '{"row":1,"col":0,"colSpan":12}')

steps.name: start batch with signature
statements: UPDATE execution.batch_orders SET status = 'IN_EXECUTION', ebr_status = 'EXECUTION_STARTED' WHERE id = 'batch-001'
UPDATE execution.batch_steps SET status = 'COMPLETE', recorded_by = 'op-001', note = 'dispense completed within tolerance and recipe phase followed' WHERE id = 'batch-step-001'
UPDATE execution.batch_phase_records SET phase_state = 'COMPLETE', recorded_by = 'op-001', note = 'ISA-88 phase executed with verified released lots' WHERE id = 'phase-rec-001'

INSERT INTO compliance.batch_signatures (id, batch_id, signature_scope, step_code, meaning, signer_id, signer_role, reason) VALUES ('sig-001', 'batch-001', 'PHASE', 'DISPENSE_VERIFY', 'step-verification', 'op-001', 'operator', 'materials dispensed and verified with e-signature')

steps.name: raise deviation and hold batch
statements: INSERT INTO quality.deviations (id, batch_id, phase_record_id, lot_id, equipment_id, status, severity, summary) VALUES ('dev-001', 'batch-001', 'phase-rec-002', 'lot-api-001', 'equip-002', 'OPEN', 'MAJOR', 'blend uniformity sample drifted outside pre-alert band during mixing phase')
INSERT INTO quality.quality_reviews (id, deviation_id, review_stage, decision, rationale) VALUES ('review-001', 'dev-001', 'INITIAL_TRIAGE', 'OPEN', 'investigation started while batch is held')
UPDATE execution.batch_orders SET status = 'ON_HOLD', ebr_status = 'UNDER_QA_REVIEW' WHERE id = 'batch-001'
UPDATE execution.batch_steps SET status = 'ON_HOLD', recorded_by = 'op-002', note = 'mixing paused pending investigation' WHERE id = 'batch-step-002'
UPDATE execution.batch_phase_records SET phase_state = 'ON_HOLD', recorded_by = 'op-002', note = 'ISA-88 mixing phase paused pending QA investigation' WHERE id = 'phase-rec-002'

INSERT INTO compliance.deviation_attestations (id, deviation_id, meaning, signer_id, signer_role, reason) VALUES ('attest-001', 'dev-001', 'deviation-opened', 'qa-001', 'quality-reviewer', 'formal investigation opened')

steps.name: revise master recipe after batch start
statements: UPDATE recipe.master_recipes SET title = 'Ibuprofen Suspension 200 mg/5mL - Rev B' WHERE id = 'recipe-001'
UPDATE recipe.recipe_parameters SET target_value = '480' WHERE id = 'recipe-param-001'
UPDATE recipe.recipe_phases SET instruction_text = 'Blend suspension at revised validated speed until uniformity target is met' WHERE id = 'recipe-phase-002'

steps.name: close deviation and release batch
statements: UPDATE quality.deviations SET status = 'CLOSED' WHERE id = 'dev-001'

UPDATE quality.quality_reviews SET review_stage = 'FINAL_DISPOSITION', decision = 'USE_AS_IS', rationale = 'investigation confirmed no impact to potency, ISA-95 equipment traceability, or eBR completeness' WHERE id = 'review-001'
UPDATE execution.batch_orders SET status = 'RELEASED', ebr_status = 'QA_APPROVED' WHERE id = 'batch-001'
UPDATE execution.batch_steps SET status = 'COMPLETE', recorded_by = 'op-003', note = 'mixing resumed and met revised instruction check' WHERE id = 'batch-step-002'
UPDATE execution.batch_steps SET status = 'COMPLETE', recorded_by = 'op-004', note = 'fill and pack completed with reconciliation check' WHERE id = 'batch-step-003'
UPDATE execution.batch_phase_records SET phase_state = 'COMPLETE', recorded_by = 'op-003', note = 'mixing resumed under revised recipe instruction' WHERE id = 'phase-rec-002'
UPDATE execution.batch_phase_records SET phase_state = 'COMPLETE', recorded_by = 'op-004', note = 'filling run completed with reconciliation check' WHERE id = 'phase-rec-003'
